title: Portfolio Management Techniques: What is the formula for calculating the expected return of...
summary: Identify the portfolio expected return formula as the weighted average of asset returns.
prompt: What is the formula for calculating the expected return of a portfolio?

options.text: The expected return of a portfolio is calculated as the weighted average of the
Minimizes risk for a given return

solution: The expected return of a portfolio is calculated as the weighted average of the expected returns of the assets in the portfolio.
